articles.title: Polluted creek water seeps into DPS Lake in Navi Mumbai, worsens wetland crisis

articles.description: FIFA World Cup 2026 match schedule for 27 June, including match timings in India, venues, fixtures, standings and live streaming details: The FIFA World Cup 2026 group stage intensifies on June 27 with six crucial matches determining knockout stage seeding. Powerhouses Argentina, England, and Portugal are in action, facing Jordan, Panama, and Colombia respectively. For Indian fans, these high-stakes games kick off in the early hours of June 28, promising thrilling football as teams vie for top group positions and a favourable path forward.

articles.title: Bhabi Ji Ghar Par Hai actress Shubhangi Atre opens up on loneliness in industry; says 'You can be surrounded by people and still feel unheard'
articles.description: In an insightful revelation, Shubhangi Atre, famed for her role as Angoori Bhabi, shared her experiences of loneliness within the entertainment world. She believes this loneliness is not just about being alone, but rather the absence of substantial dialogue. Stating that true empathy outweighs mere advice, she remarked on social media's inability to forge real connections.

articles.title: Adam McKay and Will Ferrell’s fall out: ‘Vice’ star reveals they had a ‘great run’, open to working together again
articles.description: Filmmaker Adam McKay has recently shared his eagerness to reunite with his long-time comedic ally, Will Ferrell, after their split in 2019 due to tensions surrounding their production company, Gary Sanchez. McKay fondly reminisced about their collaborative efforts and emphasized that he harbors no resentment. He remains optimistic about the possibility of future collaborations, highlighting the creative chemistry they once shared.

articles.title: 'Without G-Spark, it’s incomplete': Fans react to Hindi adaptation of Sanju Rathod's 'Gulabi Sadi' in 'Dhamaal 4' starring Riteish Deshmukh and Anjali Anand
articles.description: The makers of 'Dhamaal 4' have released 'Saree,' a Bollywood rendition of the viral Marathi hit "Gulabi Sadi." While Tanishk Bagchi recreated the music and Kumaar penned new lyrics, fans are celebrating singer Sanju Rathod's entry into Hindi cinema. Despite the appreciation, some listeners miss the original production by G-Spark. The film, featuring a star-studded cast, is set to hit theatres on July 10.

articles.title: Actor Darshan's son's car involved in accident in Bengaluru? Family clarifies what really happened
articles.description: Rumours claimed that Darshan Thoogudeepa's son, Vineesh, was injured and hospitalised after a road accident in Bengaluru, but his family has dismissed the reports as false, saying he is safe and was not driving the vehicle.

articles.title: Priyanka Chopra on success: 'I can make mistakes, I'm human' at Cannes
articles.description: Speaking at Cannes Lions, Priyanka Chopra Jonas said embracing imperfection and authenticity, not perfection, has been key to her success. She said connecting with fans by admitting mistakes and evolving has been central to her decades-long career.

articles.title: From contestant to collaborator: Debojit Dutta’s full-circle moment with Shankar Mahadevan
articles.description: For composer Debojit Dutta, Naqsh-e-Qadam marks the fulfilment of a dream that began during his stint as a contestant on Sa Re Ga Ma Pa in 2008. Nearly two decades later, he has composed a song sung by his former mentor and one of India’s most celebrated musicians, Shankar Mahadevan. Debojit reflects on the journey from contestant to collaborator, while Mahadevan speaks about nurturing young talent, respecting a composer’s vision and staying grounded despite global recognition, including a Grammy Award. Together, they celebrate a partnership built on admiration, humility and a shared passion for music.

This star-studded comedy is celebrated for encapsulating the frivolous essence of Bollywood. While a few critics argue it was overly prolonged and missed depth, plenty of moviegoers are eager for its box office triumph, especially those in search of unadulterated amusement.

articles.title: Tamil Nadu CM Vijay showcases impressive fitness at 53
articles.description: Tamil Nadu Chief Minister Vijay, at 53, demonstrated remarkable fitness by completing a 6km 'Start Run, Stop Drugs' marathon in Chennai. Leading thousands, including ministers and volunteers, he administered an anti-drug pledge and actively participated, even offering water to fellow runners. Videos of his energetic run and motivational presence have gone viral, highlighting his disciplined lifestyle and commitment to public awareness.

articles.title: Movie Dialogue of the Day from Taken: Liam Neeson's 'I don't know who you are. I don’t know what you want. I will look for you, I will find you, and I will kill you'
articles.description: Movie Dialogue of the Day: Liam Neeson's chilling monologue in the 2008 action thriller 'Taken' cemented its place in pop culture. His character, Bryan Mills, a former operative, delivers a calm yet terrifying warning to his daughter's kidnappers, showcasing his specialized skills and unwavering determination. This iconic scene, born from a father's fierce protectiveness, propelled the film to success and highlighted the powerful theme of family bonds pushing individuals beyond their limits.

articles.title: 'Ananthan Kaadu' box office collections day 1: Arya and Murali Gopy's film opens with Rs 65 lakh India Net
articles.description: Arya's latest political action thriller, 'Ananthan Kaadu', has opened to a modest Rs 65 lakhs net on its first day, with the Malayalam version leading collections. Despite praise for Arya's performance and Murali Gopy's writing, some reviews criticize the film for its dated approach. The movie garnered a 14% overall occupancy, with night shows showing the strongest audience interest.

articles.title: “That's huge”: Patrick Mahomes stunned fans with a surprising offseason reveal while Brittany Mahomes lands big new role
articles.description: Patrick Mahomes has Kansas City Chiefs fans talking again after a viral family photo with Brittany Mahomes sparked fresh speculation over his injury recovery. Fans quickly noticed one subtle detail that could signal a major step in Patrick Mahomes’ return ahead of training camp. At the same time, Brittany Mahomes is making headlines after landing a new Yahoo World Cup role. With Patrick Mahomes’ comeback and Brittany Mahomes’ growing sports empire, the power couple remains at the centre of the NFL offseason buzz
